message.content: i dont want zellij to remember the tabs and commands ran in previouse sessions, if i kill a session or restart the computer i want to create a session with the same name with a fresh set of panes

content.text: Add `session_serialization false` to disable Zellij's session resurrection:

content.content: The file /home/jofre/.dotfiles/config/zellij/config.kdl has been updated successfully.

content.text: Done. `session_serialization false` disables Zellij from saving/restoring session state (tabs, panes, commands) across restarts. Sessions with the same name will start fresh.

lastPrompt: i dont want zellij to remember the tabs and commands ran in previouse sessions, if i kill a session or restart the computer i want to create a session with the same name with a fresh set of panes
